goals: Create a new pod to store the user's insect and arachnid illustration collection
Add initial notes about the collection, including interests in unique and detailed illustrations
Ingest documents and images related to insects and arachnids into the pod
Perform semantic search to find specific content about favorite species or artists

user_agent_config.personality: Passionate about unique insect and arachnid illustrations, detail-oriented, values organization
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands art collection management but not technical tool names

end_condition: User has successfully created a pod, added notes, ingested documents, and performed search queries
